_comment: agentmemory Claude Code hook configuration — 14 lifecycle events mapped to memory_observe for unified observation recording and context injection. Notes: (1) Diagnostics and PostCommit are forward-looking events — they are defined in the spec (FR-008) but are not yet standard Claude Code hook event names; they will silently pass through when those events arrive in a future Claude Code release. (2) See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/hooks for the list of standard hook event names.

input.title: Session started
input.narrative: A new agent session has been created. This event is a context trigger — relevant memories and slots are injected into the system prompt.

input.title: User prompt submitted
input.narrative: The user submitted a prompt to the agent.

PreToolUse._comment: Note: file_paths cannot be passed dynamically via Claude Code hooks (static args only). The tool will return skipped when file_paths is absent. For file-specific context, call memory_observe directly with type=pre_tool_use and files=[...].

input.title: Pre-tool use
input.narrative: Agent is about to use Edit or Write tool. This event is a context trigger — relevant context text is injected before the tool executes.

input.title: Post-tool use
input.narrative: Agent completed a tool call. The observation captures what was done and the result.

input.title: Tool use failure
input.narrative: A tool call failed. Capturing the failure helps diagnose recurring issues.

input.title: Pre-compact
input.narrative: The context window is approaching its limit and will be compacted. This event is a context trigger — key context is preserved before compaction.

input.title: Session ended
input.narrative: The agent session has ended. Captures final state for post-session processing.

input.title: Notification received
input.narrative: An asynchronous notification was received during the session.

input.title: Stop signal
input.narrative: A stop signal was received, interrupting the current agent activity.

input.title: Subagent started
input.narrative: A subagent was spawned to handle a delegated task.

input.title: Subagent stopped
input.narrative: A subagent completed or was terminated.

input.title: Task completed
input.narrative: A task tracked by the agent was marked complete.

PostCommit._comment: Forward-looking: PostCommit is not yet a standard Claude Code hook event. Included per spec FR-008 for future support.

input.title: Post-commit
input.narrative: A git commit was created. Captures commit context for session-to-commit linking.

Diagnostics._comment: Forward-looking: Diagnostics is not yet a standard Claude Code hook event. Included per spec FR-008 for future support.

input.title: Diagnostics event
input.narrative: A diagnostics event was emitted during the session, carrying operational or performance information.
